creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: Change of plans, go ahead and commit these ones. At the moment I can't get version 4.0.3 of Scintilla to compile under FreeBSD 10 (not sure about 11 yet) because it has changed to using C++17 and the compile fails due to them using std::clamp, which wasn't introduced until C++17. When I figure out how to compile them, I'll submit a separate bug report.
